key_facts: DD Franchisor wholly-owned subsidiary of DB Franchising Holding Company LLC
Ultimate parent: Inspire Brands, Inc.
Management agreement with DBI — company has no employees
Securitization structure: DB Master Finance LLC

sub_families.detail: GAAP; no other entities consolidated; VIE assessment for SVC Service II Inc.
Gift card program entity; DD Franchisor has variable interest but NOT primary beneficiary; cannot quantify max exposure to loss; no unfunded gift card admin expenses reimbursed as of Dec 28, 2025
52/53-week year ending Sunday closest to Dec 31; 2025/2024/2023 all 52 weeks
Held to meet securitization reserve requirements; in excess of FDIC limits
Primarily royalties, franchise fees, advertising fees from franchisees; allowance based on lifetime expected credit losses; $4.8M allowance (2025), $5.5M (2024)
Franchise agreements amortized straight-line 10-29 years; tested for impairment when events/circumstances indicate; no impairment in 2025/2024/2023

ASC 606 five-step model; IFFs allocated to individual restaurants and recognized over franchise term from opening date; royalties recognized weekly as sales occur; renewal fees over renewal term; transfer fees over remaining term; incentives over remaining term
CAF = continuing advertising fees recognized as earned weekly; advertising expenses = obligation to remit to DBI; revenues ≥ expenses accrued
Primarily online training fees recognized over agreement term

LLC treated as disregarded entity for federal/state; no US income tax provision; earnings flow to Inspire's consolidated return; no tax sharing agreement; foreign withholding taxes only ($6.3M, $6.1M, $5.98M)
Via Inspire centralized cash management; not expected to be repaid; presented net on equity statement and as financing on cash flow
Level 1/2/3 hierarchy; restricted cash, A/R, A/P approximate book value; no changes in valuation techniques
ASU 2023-09 (Income Tax Disclosures) adopted retrospectively in 2025; no material impact

key_facts: 2025: $2,899K total ($1,881K accrued settlements + $1,018K other)
2024: $2,656K ($1,748K settlements + $908K other)
Gross carrying amount: $1,760,000K (unchanged 2024→2025)
Accumulated amortization: $306,599K (2025), $245,714K (2024)
Annual amortization: $60,885K for 2026-2030 and each year
Thereafter: $1,148,976K
Total remaining: $1,453,401K
Revenue recognized from prior year deferrals: $10,102K (2025), $9,284K (2024), $7,306K (2023)
All income tax expense is foreign withholding taxes: $6.3M (2025), $6.1M (2024), $6.0M (2023)
No US income tax provision due to disregarded entity status
Statutory rate 21% but not applied to this entity
Company is GUARANTOR of Master Issuer securitization notes
Substantially ALL assets pledged as security
Total notes outstanding: $4,639,050K
2019 VFN: $150M capacity, $88.8M drawn, $61.2M available
2023 VFN: $850M capacity, $0 drawn ($56.4M in LOC), $793.6M available
2025 Fixed Rate Notes ($900M) used to repay 2019-1 notes ($376M), repay 2023 VFN draws ($481.6M), fees, and distribute remainder to Inspire
Management agreement with DBI — company has NO employees
DBI performs all franchise management, collection, new agreement execution, pre/post-opening services
DBI receives management fee from Master Issuer — NOT allocated to DD Franchisor
Advertising fees deposited to Master Issuer account, withdrawn by DBI for advertising fund administration
Advertising due to affiliates ($42.3M) = fees receivable to be remitted to DBI upon collection
Evaluated through March 19, 2026
No items to disclose or requiring adjustment

key_observations: Total assets $13.8B dominated by intangible assets ($8.2B = 59.7%) and goodwill ($3.6B = 26.2%)
Deferred tax liabilities $1.9B — significant tax shield from acquisition intangibles
Equity method investments $122M — international franchise operations
Notes receivable from affiliate $560M — intercompany lending
